title: meriandra bengalensis
intro: Meriandra bengalensis, also known as Bengal mercury vine, is a type of flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Meriandra bengalensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine practices.
